name: Jason Yates
subject: UPDATE on Asia Bibi
body:
| | Peter, Last month we urged you to call on the United States to grant asylum to Asia Bibi, a Christian mother in Pakistan falsely accused of violating Pakistan’s blasphemy laws. Bibi was first accused in 2010, and she has experienced a long, 9-year journey facing the death penalty because of her Christian faith. But ever since Pakistan’s Supreme Court acquitted her of blasphemy charges on October 31st, 2018, Pakistani Islamic leaders have actively sought to kill her, her family, and the three judges who ruled in her favor. Her lawyer, Saiful Malook, who bravely took on her case despite threats to his own life, had to flee Pakistan to the Netherlands after the ruling of Bibi’s acquittal. It was no longer safe for him to remain in Pakistan. **But here’s the latest update.** **Saiful Malook has said _he will_ return to Pakistan to defend Bibi in court as the Islamic party, Tehreek-e-Labaik, petitions Pakistan’s Supreme Court to overturn the acquittal. ** And unfortunately, the White House has not yet offered asylum to Asia Bibi. If there were ever a case that challenges our country’s commitment to religious freedom and could offer protection to someone who is facing extreme persecution for their faith – this is it! These past two months Asia Bibi has remained in an undisclosed location because Islamic hardliners have sought to hunt her down, going house to house in Pakistan searching for her. Bibi’s husband has pleaded for asylum in the UK (which the UK has denied), Canada and the United States, but so far the United States has not issued asylum to Asia Bibi. I want to thank each one of you who have already taken action and contacted President Trump, Secretary Pompeo and your members in Congress. Throughout history, the United States has been a refuge for those experiencing religious persecution, and yet in this case, we have failed to offer Bibi asylum in America. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=gWcjnkEDiVC2lFmodERGN6ljpzW70VCEXIuedLX0Fms&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190108p2a01&n=1) **If you have not yet taken action yet,[please send an email today.](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=gWcjnkEDiVC2lFmodERGN6ljpzW70VCEXIuedLX0Fms&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190108p2a01&n=2) ** We have made it very easy for you to take action. [Using our simple tool](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=gWcjnkEDiVC2lFmodERGN6ljpzW70VCEXIuedLX0Fms&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190108p2a01&n=3) and pre-written message you can quickly email President Trump, your representatives, and Secretary Pompeo. And most importantly, please continue to pray daily for Asia Bibi, her family, and her attorney Saiful Malook. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=gWcjnkEDiVC2lFmodERGN6ljpzW70VCEXIuedLX0Fms&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190108p2a01&n=4) Once you take action, share this message with as many Christians as you can who will stand with us in prayer and action to see Asia Bibi and her family protected. **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190108p2a01&n=5)
---
* * *
©2019 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190108p2a01&n=6).
[ ](//www.facebook.com/myfaithvotes) [ ](//www.twitter.com/myfaithvotes) [ ](//www.instagram.com/myfaithvotes)

name: Data Team at Lipinski for Congress
subject: Hey, did you see this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Lipinski for CongressContributions or gifts to Dan Lipinski for Congress are not tax deductible
body:
Did you have a chance to take this survey?
If not, you can use this link: https://act.democrataction.com/dl-break-the-gridlock-survey/ [https://act.democrataction.com/dl-break-the-gridlock-survey/]
Begin forwarded message: http://www.lipinskiforcongress.com/ [http://www.lipinskiforcongress.com/]
Hi Peter,
I hope you had a wonderful and relaxing holiday season! I’m back in Washington, DC to welcome the new Congress and get to work fixing our gridlock and hyper-partisan system.
As I told you before the holidays, my colleagues and I introduced a new rules package to increase transparency and bipartisanship in the House, and I want to know which proposal you’re most excited about.
Take our Break the Gridlock survey, and tell us which proposal you think will be most effective [https://act.democrataction.com/dl-break-the-gridlock-survey/]
Here’s a quick recap: 1.
The
first
proposal
mandates
that
if
20
Democrats
and
20
Republicans
co-sponsor
an
amendment,
then
the
amendment
immediately
gets
brought
to
the
floor
for
debate
2.
3.
The
second
proposal
mandates
that
any
bill
that
has
290
cosponsors
be
debated
and
voted
on
the
House
floor
4.
5.
The
third
rule
change
would
commit
the
House
to
a
more
fair
and
inclusive
process
where
more
ideas
and
amendments
are
debated,
and
there
is
less
of
a
reliance
on
closed
rules
Take the survey and rate your choices [https://act.democrataction.com/dl-break-the-gridlock-survey/]
I firmly believe that these changes will foster bipartisanship and get Congress back to what it’s supposed to be doing: working for everyday Americans. But I want to know what you think! [https://act.democrataction.com/dl-break-the-gridlock-survey/]
Thanks for standing with me as we fix Congress and increase bipartisanship.
—Dan
P.S. I really want to hear from you about which proposal is most important in your mind. Here’s the link to the survey one more time: https://act.democrataction.com/dl-break-the-gridlock-survey/ [https://act.democrataction.com/dl-break-the-gridlock-survey/]
Paid for by Dan Lipinski for CongressContributions or gifts to Dan Lipinski for Congress are not tax deductible.
Unsubscribe Now [http://https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/d2da886d-bc12-e911-9f2a-281878391efb/3022d625-8413-e911-9f2a-281878391efb?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDIyZDYyNS04NDEzLWU5MTEtOWYyYS0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8HPZaHj3wrdRLhSlMYHryKiD7WgWul0tbsV3eKYnUJQ=&id=103593688&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com]
Dan Lipinski for Congress
P.O. Box 520
Western Springs, IL 60558
United States
clean_body: Did you have a chance to take this survey? If not, you can use this link: [] Begin forwarded message: [] Hi Peter, I hope you had a wonderful and relaxing holiday season! I’m back in Washington, DC to welcome the new Congress and get to work fixing our gridlock and hyper-partisan system. As I told you before the holidays, my colleagues and I introduced a new rules package to increase transparency and bipartisanship in the House, and I want to know which proposal you’re most excited about. Take our Break the Gridlock survey, and tell us which proposal you think will be most effective [] Here’s a quick recap: 1. The first proposal mandates that if 20 Democrats and 20 Republicans co-sponsor an amendment, then the amendment immediately gets brought to the floor for debate 2. 3. The second proposal mandates that any bill that has 290 cosponsors be debated and voted on the House floor 4. 5. The third rule change would commit the House to a more fair and inclusive process where more ideas and amendments are debated, and there is less of a reliance on closed rules Take the survey and rate your choices [] I firmly believe that these changes will foster bipartisanship and get Congress back to what it’s supposed to be doing: working for everyday Americans. But I want to know what you think! [] Thanks for standing with me as we fix Congress and increase bipartisanship. —Dan P.S. I really want to hear from you about which proposal is most important in your mind. Here’s the link to the survey one more time: [] Paid for by Dan Lipinski for CongressContributions or gifts to Dan Lipinski for Congress are not tax deductible.

In order to have the 2019 that we need to ensure victory in 2020, **we need $5,000 in this week through membership renewals.** It is clear that Republican policies are working in New Hampshire and across the nation. That's why we need a strong and effective State GOP. Please join me in supporting our Party. It is imperative that we continue to fight. [Your membership renewal of $35 or something more generous](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyBO5kQrx-2FesLRaGJ1fd7TCqcycBI512yYjvguVrkx1y-2Fz9KPysRoLmviHiSY-2BFOWSHOGao9s2cN5Lpg1UVge77rkWwwNcxZ2mVB26YZGOSbY_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30M88X-2BKoHIF3POyceIDYHwJq3z2dymY4gvKKaeaqzdEe13SND21qqBoPr92-2FuKySkb-2BMhQ2a2X5cF8paCK9Vwe4mejApRFUmTH243io2AihL-2BkeLiwOHdT0U-2BOouiJTyZBQ54qXHiUVOfNFhZljsHLWlAOWd47wOJ-2B31kmKUL3CxgGWYFtgswdchaK4jgMUWRkUNkj5ZhBlUlWmZ7g9OgJiKR4C6V0Q-2BXlc8On9uxO6T6xDeAoMFw4vh4qVo8DufzQpGDdO3CzCfUr4a-2B15k6arw-3D-3D) will give our party the resources need to win back our state legislature! Sincerely, Juliana Bergeron Republican National Committeewoman New Hampshire [P.S. Help us reach our Membership Moneybomb goal by joining today!](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyBO5kQrx-2FesLRaGJ1fd7TCqcycBI512yYjvguVrkx1y-2Fz9KPysRoLmviHiSY-2BFOWSHOGao9s2cN5Lpg1UVge77rkWwwNcxZ2mVB26YZGOSbY_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30M88X-2BKoHIF3POyceIDYHwJq3z2dymY4gvKKaeaqzdEe13SND21qqBoPr92-2FuKySkb-2BMhQ2a2X5cF8paCK9Vwe4ke6txMh9Jn54ThACXlA9Oew2yXshzJy6ZSDxTmN6fy20pjvjzb51b-2FoqcVdOWq18JVb8cRsKoZtYu3jjUkqJ7BHVC5QY9X92O2lRKRvoI2FVkBlnb1OEdb7owpuh32AsRkDXfXdOxplhW0YtoGXhcqFpE1roopUniqHWilf6u48wx5s8paDu1em5I94IUw61g-3D-3D)

clean_body: Derek, The Membership Renewal emails have been met with great responses so far, but - In order to have the 2019 that we need to ensure victory in 2020, we need $5,000 in this week through membership renewals. It is clear that Republican policies are working in New Hampshire and across the nation. That's why we need a strong and effective State GOP. Please join me in supporting our Party. It is imperative that we continue to fight. will give our party the resources need to win back our state legislature! Sincerely, Juliana Bergeron Republican National Committeewoman New Hampshire | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Republican Party of New Hampshire 10 Water Street Concord New Hampshire 03301

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ian=20Todd?=
subject: Urgent: Special Election for MN State Senate District 11
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY IAN TODD FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
# I am Endorsing
Michelle Lee

Friends,

There is a very important special election that was just announced last week for Minnesota's 11th State senate seat. That means that we only have 1 month to show our support for Michelle in her campaign.

Why am I endorsing Michelle Lee? I am endorsing Michelle because she has a lifelong record of working to improve the lives of our community. Michelle is also dedicated to fighting for our clean air and water here in Minnesota; she is also a strong supporter of rural broadband and improved healthcare.

I am asking you to support her campaign by donating today because every penny will count in this high paced special election.

Your Friend,

Ian Todd

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Here's what furloughed workers are saying about the shutdown
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | President Trump told Democratic leaders that he's willing to keep the government closed for "months or even years" until he gets his border wall money. He said that if he asked furloughed workers, they would tell him: "Mr. President keep going, this is far more important." **This government shutdown is another example of how out of touch President Trump is with American workers.** **Here 's what workers and their families are really saying about the shutdown:** | | _"My husband and I are retired federal employees in our mid 80's. We worry about our pension checks. My granddaughter works for a company that deals with government agencies and it is already affecting her work."_ \-- Dee, Cleveland
---

| _"I am a civil servant working at NASA Glenn Research Center in Cleveland. I have been furloughed during the government shutdown. My wife and I also welcomed our second child, Lucy, into our family on November 28th, 2018. As you can imagine, being furloughed with a newborn child at home is stressful enough. But since our country is one of the only countries in the world without paid maternity leave, my wife is currently on unpaid status from her job [...]

The result is that our family currently has no income because of this ridiculous funding debacle. We had carefully planned our savings out to allow my wife some time away from work after Lucy was born. I do not know how much longer our family will be able to hold out."_ \-- Brandon, Cleveland
---

| _"Daily, the utility companies are writing with threats to disconnect the service to my home because they haven 't been paid. I cannot pay them when I'm not getting paid myself.

Soon, prescriptions will need to be refilled for chronic illnesses. Do we take out loans for this? Why should we be forced to take on additional debts?

The children have needs. I'm positive that he doesn't care about regular families that are affected by his hasty decision process."_ \-- Herlean, Fairfield
---
**We receieved thousands of responses like these** from the people who make our government--and our nation--work:
800,000 Americans are without paychecks right now. Hundreds of thousands of people are still expected to work without pay--and for many, they won't ever collect a paycheck because they are considered a contract worker.
This shutdown is a betrayal to our workers and to our country. [**Demand Trump end the shutdown.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffdea/4462dc26/88d1ab63/201ee05f/1592463474/VEsH/ "https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/e190108m")
With gratitude,
Sherrod

|
---
[www.sherrodbrown.com](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffdea/4462dc26/88d1ab63/201ee05e/1592463474/VEsE/ "https://www.sherrodbrown.com/")
| | Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
---
Contributions or gifts to Friends of Sherrod Brown are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
[Click here to unsubscribe](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffdea/4462dc26/88d1ab63/201ee05d/1592463474/VEsF/ "https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/unsubscribe")

name: DonaldJTrump.com
subject: President Trump just got the list
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
He didn’t see your name |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=2e0c70441be05d121147a5ef15bb1fa9a42fc7818cafd1bc302a5375bbbcf12914888bb7dc80ef5cacaf3855373ad98fa7fbc088e5806f5d)
---

Friend,

President Trump just finished his speech addressing our National Security crisis on the Southern Border and explaining why he will NOT cave to the Democrats when it comes to YOUR SAFETY.

We sent him a list of all patriots who donated to our Official Secure the Border Fund and he noticed your name wasn't on the list, Friend.

He figured this couldn't be right because he knows how much you care about BUILDING THE WALL.

Since you've been such a strong supporter and one of our greatest advocates for THE WALL, we have decided to extend your deadline to get on the list to **11:59 PM TONIGHT.**
| **[Please make a special contribution of $5 by 11:59 PM EST to our Official Secure the Border Fund to get on the FINAL list we send President Trump.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=72f9294d9746a042790496d0ab473c8efde5633f2ce631fcd8c16037d65e5c13b79c8b9abbf7743ccca616ef85f7fe8c31eca6584fb57860)** [CONTRIBUTE $20](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=72f9294d9746a0427606703b5e3f93c3537eb0d3906668f691fa60a2e81206323d271b299776ce413169a4dc7416e7bc1f20e95775c21a19) [CONTRIBUTE $15](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=72f9294d9746a042518432607df72ecf449b13a010eebe2d462181a31fb57ac2601289b6dbb311c574ba7c47fae07b8ca2540fa9b3fa4a35) [CONTRIBUTE $10](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=72f9294d9746a04233d68c76f2754f3c64dd21f67523d53bd983cd8902f8a44a131cc3662c3d82e1e3a140615d6bea1a850ceec749070665) [CONTRIBUTE $5](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=72f9294d9746a042036a14752f32ada5ea91bb292cf65157acf74e227aee703df6c34f72252ab5bc85b0864c8b308ff5c635d40de56496b8) [CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=72f9294d9746a042335e539f05e7a83703809698580a2926468eddba9edc90968036ab98139f5973e2e9cc83f525dc0ddb6091bcfd0cad64)
The President is counting on you in this fight, we must hit our goal of $5OO,OOO in ONE DAY.

**[Please make a special contribution of $5 by 11:59 PM EST to our Official Secure the Border Fund to get on the FINAL list we send President Trump.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=72f9294d9746a0422d397d4281b03c87d37605fa2e3179ec83e7a41f47cdde3a5c112fb5d5f7e08776b747edc7bb9c28cada824decf15ae5)**

Thanks,
Team Trump
[CONTRIBUTE $5](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=72f9294d9746a042e4288498ebb90138fa3c66ff25a3af3c8999ca4f023b783498a1e9bdb2c0091c467917874b48a450cf719b85d56df7a8)

**\--------- Forwarded Message ---------
From: **Donald J. Trump
**Subject:** Tonight:
**To:[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=2e0c70441be05d12cdefda7124e8ec76ad0dcec52a25e0f79f06fc1f6d570a8403f1a21d652cb7604fa09a8bb964db9b9bbae54253988f76)**

---
Friend,

I will be addressing the nation tonight at 9 PM EST on the Humanitarian and National Security crisis on our Southern Border.

Just look at the facts:
* Drugs are poisoning our loved ones
* MS-13 gang members are threatening our safety
* Illegal criminals are flooding our nation

I want to make one thing clear to Chuck Schumer and Nancy Pelosi:
---
| **Your safety is not a political game or a negotiation tactic!**
---
The American people have signed over 2,OOO,OOO petitions demanding Democrats finally put America First and BUILD THE WALL...._but Chuck and Nancy simply won 't listen._

That's why I want to do something so HUGE, even Democrats and the Fake News won't be able to ignore.

**We need to raise $5OO,OOO in ONE DAY.**

I want to know who stood with me when it mattered most so I've asked my team to send me a list of EVERY AMERICAN PATRIOT who donates to the Official Secure the Border Fund.
---
| **[Please make a special contribution of $5 by 9 PM EST to our Official Secure the Border Fund to have your name sent to me after my speech.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=72f9294d9746a04227fe01b857953956025be7aaa29b0368196ac4507cd3eb23f71ae05a2f5df410177c84f0456e353ddf146a0ca9537db0)** [CONTRIBUTE $20](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=72f9294d9746a042606f5095c0dca90c38c637d09f0a2bed95ec7d84981035448f3c2c573868264d8270ff83942cf8d7243e9d192ca12f86) [CONTRIBUTE $15](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=72f9294d9746a042afa1437c0e28e640708fcc2289c6024c79b3649643edeb7db3436dbd2234c4245c8d90caba5147f111193106c58fc9e4) [CONTRIBUTE $10](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=72f9294d9746a042108ffc523fba7742c8b38c76ffd03c909ad22a8ee48c45467813520ad4357b92df9605e03aa8f8c0abac5e1c52f2d06b) [CONTRIBUTE $5](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=72f9294d9746a042605e4b0ab369a5577e7cdc2de4a933af2df169a25c34c90e9fbe9ab118d92831d12bb6bad534f2732169802c8f4ffc3e) [CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=72f9294d9746a04236de47a7e0632296111de8b0f4d00d282e07ee40c987641506e3b0e75cffce5284ab1d9165b17205e76ef1563d0557e7)
I wouldn't be speaking to you tonight if this wasn't one of the most critical times in the history of our country. I need you to step up, Friend.

**[Please make a special contribution of $5 by 9 PM EST to our Official Secure the Border Fund to have your name sent to me after this important address.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=72f9294d9746a042512637876a0234653e5fa89611940e44b4d9edffb96ecdc52c076c158528f14ea314d5f6d09cc758d088e7a79c59e71c)**

Thanks,

[](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=72f9294d9746a04293105a1733d79679f3c96b074e22d009199e124463b420ee29628476406ed10ee4b53382c84367ba4f82ea2b7f602c1c)
Donald J. Trump
President of the United States

[CONTRIBUTE $5](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=72f9294d9746a0426bae5c5e0b9cbeb9f6ee587ca5594fdfa479e0c296fe3e5437585126bf194b29599e7a0506915886999958c8a893574d)
